triageFlags.title: Credit Score in Tier C
triageFlags.description: The applicant's credit score places them in Tier C, requiring stricter lending criteria.
triageFlags.recommendation: Ensure all Tier C requirements, including minimum deposit and affordability checks, are met.
triageFlags.reasoning: According to the policy, a credit score of 550-619 places the applicant in Tier C, which necessitates stricter lending criteria and a minimum deposit of 10%.

triageFlags.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio within Tier C Limit
triageFlags.description: The applicant's DTI ratio is within the acceptable limit for Tier C.
triageFlags.recommendation: Verify the income details to ensure the DTI calculation is accurate.
triageFlags.reasoning: The policy allows a maximum DTI of 35% for Tier C applicants. The current DTI is within this limit, but income verification is recommended to confirm accuracy.

content.reasoning: The applicant's credit score places them in Tier C, necessitating stricter criteria. The DTI ratio is within acceptable limits for Tier C, but the credit score and associated risks warrant additional verification to ensure affordability.
